title: Bulk select up to 1000 work items in the work item navigator
description: We’ve made it easier to manage more work at once in Jira with the new bulk operations experience. Now, when you select work in the List view or the All work tab, you can select up to 1,000 work items that match your filters with a single click from the bulk operations toolbar, even if they aren’t all loaded on your screen. Previously, you could only select 50 items at a time. To bulk select multiple work items: Apply your desired filters in the List view or All work tab in your Jira space to fin
